parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write 140-190 words in an appropriate style.

tasks.lead: In your English class you have been talking about helping others. Now your English teacher has asked you to write an essay. Write an essay using all the notes and giving reasons for your point of view.

stimulus.body:
"All students should do some volunteer work before they finish school. Do you agree?"

Notes

Write about:
1. learning new skills
2. time for studying
3. ............... (your own idea)

bullets: give reasons for your point of view

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write 140-190 words in an appropriate style.

tasks.lead: You have received this email from your English-speaking friend Charlie.

stimulus.body:
From: Charlie
Subject: Free summer!

My summer plans fell through, so suddenly I have six free weeks — and I'm thinking of volunteering for the first time. You volunteered last year, didn't you? How did you choose what to do? Was it actually worth it? And is there anything nobody warns you about before you start?
Cheers,
Charlie

bullets: how you chose your volunteer work

tasks.lead: You see this announcement on an international summer camp's noticeboard.

stimulus.title: Volunteers wanted!
stimulus.body: Camp Aurora is looking for young volunteers to help run activities for children aged 8-12 this July. No experience needed — just energy and responsibility. Write a letter to the organiser, Ms Grant, explaining why you would like to volunteer, what makes you suitable, and which activities you could help with.

bullets: why you would like to volunteer
which activities you could help with
tasks.write: Write your letter to Ms Grant.

tasks.lead: You see this announcement on an English-language website for young people.

stimulus.title: Volunteering websites — do they work?
stimulus.body: There are lots of websites and apps that promise to match young people with volunteering projects. Write a review of one you have used, describing how it works, saying how easy it was to find a real project through it, and explaining whether you would recommend it to a friend.

bullets: how the website or app works
how easy it was to find a real project
